notes: Standalone Webhook Trigger node for Lane 1 inbound email processing. Import into n8n and connect output to the Email Parser node (replacing the Manual Trigger connection). After activating the workflow, the production URL will be: https://siteware.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/email-inbound
instructions: 1. Open the Siteware Lane 1 workflow in n8n
2. Add a new Webhook node to the canvas
3. Configure it with the parameters above:
- Response Mode: Using 'Respond to Webhook' Node
4. Connect the Webhook Trigger output to the Email Parser node (same node that Manual Trigger connects to)
5. Keep the IMAP Test DATA mock node connected for manual testing
6. Do NOT remove the Manual Trigger — it can coexist as an alternative entry point
9. Set N8N_WEBHOOK_URL=https://siteware.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/email-inbound in Railway env vars for the IMAP poller (Task 1)
